com.delphix.masking.api.plugin

Interface FileParser.ContentNode

  • Enclosing interface:
    FileParser

    public static interface FileParser.ContentNode
    This is the interface that the FileParser must implement for each node in the result graph returned by the buildContentGraph method.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void clearValues()
      Clear all values associated with this node.
      java.util.List<FileParser.ContentNode> getChildren()
      Return a list of all children of this node.
      int getId()
      Each content node must be assigned a unique id.
      java.lang.String getLabel()
      The string label associated with this node.
      MaskValueMetadata getMaskValueMetadata()
      Get the value metadata for this node.
      FileParser.ContentNode getParent()
      Return the parent of this node.
      java.lang.String getPath()
      The string path to this node from the content root.
      UnderlyingDataType getType()
      The type of this node
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> getValues()
      Return the list of values associated with this node.

    • Method Detail

      • getId

        int getId()
        Each content node must be assigned a unique id. This may be used by the caller to associate the node with additional data. The ids must be sequentially assigned starting with 0.
        Returns:
        The id of this content node

      • getLabel

        java.lang.String getLabel()
        The string label associated with this node. Labels are not required to be unique, and as such, should not be used to identify the node. This is typically a field name or element name in documents such as JSON or XML
        Returns:
        The label of this content node

      • getPath

        java.lang.String getPath()
        The string path to this node from the content root. Path format depends on the content type, but each node should have a unique value. This may return null if the document type doesn't have a path implementation, or if the nodes path would simply by the same as its label.
        Returns:
        The path to this content node from the document root

      • getType

        UnderlyingDataType getType()
        The type of this node
        Returns:
        The type of this node's data

      • getChildren

        java.util.List<FileParser.ContentNode> getChildren()
        Return a list of all children of this node. This may return an empty list if node has no children.
        Returns:
        The list of children of this node.

      • getParent

        FileParser.ContentNode getParent()
        Return the parent of this node.
        Returns:
        The parent node, or null if this node has no parent.

      • getValues

        java.util.List<java.lang.String> getValues()
        Return the list of values associated with this node.
        Returns:
        The list of values.

      • clearValues

        void clearValues()
        Clear all values associated with this node.

      • getMaskValueMetadata

        MaskValueMetadata getMaskValueMetadata()
        Get the value metadata for this node.
        Returns:
        The MaskValueMetadata object providing all known details about this node.
